name: 🔀 [DEV] Redirect: Render → localhost:8000
description: Intercepts all API calls going to the Render backend and sends them to your local backend instead. Enable this when running the backend locally — no need to touch proxy.js.

name: 🌐 [DEV] Inject CORS headers on localhost:8000 responses
description: Adds Access-Control-Allow-Origin header to every localhost:8000 response so the frontend never gets CORS-blocked during development.

name: 🧪 [MOCK] Award Browser XP — offline stub
description: Returns a fake success response for the award-browser-xp endpoint. Enable when the backend is down and you want to test the XP banner UI in the browser sandbox.

name: 🧪 [MOCK] Leaderboard — sample data
description: Returns 5 fake leaderboard entries. Enable when the DB is empty or backend is down and you want to test LeaderboardPage rendering.

name: 🧪 [MOCK] Judge — force Accepted verdict
description: Overrides any judge response to always return 'accepted'. Enable when backend Docker sandbox is unavailable and you want to test the submission flow UI.

name: ⏱️ [TEST] Delay complexity route by 2s
description: Adds a 2-second artificial delay to the complexity analysis endpoint. Enable to test loading spinners and UX during slow analysis.

name: 🧪 [MOCK] Simulations list — 4 fake sims
description: Intercepts GET /api/v1/simulations/getSimulations and returns 4 test simulations (easy backend, medium fullstack, hard devops, easy backend). Enable when the DB has no simulations seeded yet or backend is down — lets you test the listing page filters, sort, search and category chips without real data.

name: 🧪 [MOCK] Simulation progress — mark as solved
description: Makes every GET /api/v1/simulation-progress/:id return 'solved: true'. Enable to test the solved-state UI (green badge, XP shown) on any simulation detail page without actually completing it.

name: 🧪 [MOCK] Simulation progress — force unsolved (fresh start)
description: Makes every simulation progress endpoint return 'solved: false, attempts: 0'. Enable when you want to test the first-time user experience on a sim you've already completed.

name: ⏱️ [TEST] Delay simulations list by 3s
description: Slows down GET /getSimulations by 3 seconds. Enable to test the skeleton loading state on the simulations listing page — verifies the Loader2 spinner and skeleton cards render correctly.
